title: 300 TitanPRO™ Resin Folding Chairs with 12 Dollies and 12 straps bundle
features: Streamline your event setup with our 300 TitanPRO Resin Folding Chairs Bundle, including 12 Dollies and 12 Straps.
Perfect for large gatherings, this set offers durability and easy transport for a seamless experience.
This bundle includes 300 resin folding chairs with 12 dollies and 12 straps.
You have the option of adding stack covers for each stack of chairs, to protect from dust.

This is a great bundle package for event venues that host a lot of weddings, as with 300 chairs you have everything you need for a large event, including a way to safely and efficiently store and transport your chairs to and from the ceremony and event site.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping, Free Shipping on 50 or more
